section.heading: Federal assistance in identification and location of sex offenders relocated as a result of a major disaster

content.p: The Attorney General shall provide assistance to jurisdictions in the identification and location of a sex offender relocated as a result of a major disaster.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 16943 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
